utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now compare with the final coverage plan: it includes all five top-level items. Next, check if each is fully specified with required details.
- health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides separate physical and mental health entries with plan names, who is covered, per-person costs, and a total monthly cost (€830/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: The format requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home_contents plan with monthly cost, add-ons with monthly costs, and a total costs field (€185/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: The format requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists a plan with monthly cost, add-ons with monthly costs, and a total costs field (€385/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: The format requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists multiple enhancement services and costs within health_enhancement (with a costs subtotal €500/month) and general_services (one has €20/month, the other is €250 one-time). Although no single combined subtotal for all additional services is given, costs are specified for each item. This qualifies as specified with costs.
- total_budget: The format requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan includes monthly premium before discount, discount applied, total monthly after discount, total annual premium, and one-time fees. Fully specified.
All five items are present and sufficiently detailed per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items named in the final coverage plan and match them to identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. For physical health: EliteCare Premium Plan (exists, rating 10) and SecureLife Basic Plan (exists, rating 2). For mental health: PrimeCare Premium Plan (exists, rating 10) and SecureLife Basic Plan (exists, rating 2). For property: EliteHome Premium Coverage (exists, rating 10), Home Security System Discount (exists, rating 10), Emergency Response Service (exists, rating 9). For travel: EliteTravel Premium Plan (exists, rating 10), 24/7 Travel Assistance (exists, rating 10), Concierge Services (exists, rating 8). For additional services: Wellness Programs (exists, rating 10), Specialist Access (exists, rating 10), Emergency Mental Health Care (exists, rating 8), Premium Insurance Membership (exists, rating 10), Claims Advocacy Service (exists, rating 9).
